description: A graphic with a blue banner reading 'DHS Statement Edited with AI' over a screenshot of an email reply. Several phrases in the body are struck through and replaced with red handwritten-style annotations and arrows in the margins, such as 'criminal illegal aliens', 'released by Biden', 'CALIFORNIA', 'prohibit', and 'and put American lives at risk!'. A highlighted yellow line of text is near the top.
notable_text: DHS Statement Edited with AI; criminal illegal aliens; released by Biden; and put American lives at risk!
